source_pr.title: executor: fix data race in TestFastAnalyze
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

### What is changed and how it works?

Use atomic to get/set the global value.

symptoms: executor: fix data race in TestFastAnalyze
failure_signature: executor: fix data race in TestFastAnalyze
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: fix data race in TestFastAnalyze.

evidence: evidence: executor: fix data race in TestFastAnalyze
